title: Enquiry Reviews commercial funnel metrics

source_of_truth.join_key: lead_id — the only lead identifier allowed in analytics events

privacy_rules: Do not send name, email, firm name, or full submitted URLs into analytics
lead_id is the only lead identifier in analytics
UTM params must never contain prospect email, name or company

metrics.name: Outreach click to review request
metrics.purpose: Measures whether the page earns the request
metrics.formula: Unique valid review requests / unique outreach landing sessions

numerator.definition: COUNT of rows where status is not 'Not suitable' and requested_at is set (valid review requests in period)

denominator.definition: Unique landing_view events filtered to outreach UTMs (source in outbound_email, linkedin, whatsapp, cold_call) in the same period

metrics.name: Request to completed review
metrics.purpose: Measures delivery capacity and lead suitability

numerator.definition: COUNT of rows where review_delivered_at is non-empty

denominator.definition: COUNT of rows where requested_at is non-empty and status is not 'Not suitable'

numerator.definition: COUNT of rows where discussion_held_at is non-empty

denominator.definition: COUNT of rows where review_delivered_at is non-empty

metrics.name: Discussion to verified problem
metrics.formula: Discussions with an agreed, worthwhile problem / discussions held

numerator.definition: COUNT of rows where problem_verified_at is non-empty

denominator.definition: COUNT of rows where discussion_held_at is non-empty

metrics.name: Verified problem to paid project
metrics.purpose: Measures commercial fit and solution credibility

numerator.definition: COUNT of rows where paid_project_at is non-empty

denominator.definition: COUNT of rows where problem_verified_at is non-empty

supporting_behavioural_metrics.name: Landing page view to video play
Video progress milestones
supporting_behavioural_metrics.formula: Unique video_progress by milestone (25/50/75/90) / unique video_play

supporting_behavioural_metrics.name: Error rate by form field
supporting_behavioural_metrics.formula: review_form_error count grouped by field / review_form_start

supporting_behavioural_metrics.name: Conversion by outreach channel
supporting_behavioural_metrics.formula: review_request_success / landing_view grouped by source + medium + campaign

supporting_behavioural_metrics.name: Median time from request to review delivery

dashboard_notes: Use timestamps for funnel calculations; do not infer stage timing from free-text notes
Filter Not suitable / Closed out of conversion denominators where appropriate
Trace a test visitor: landing_view (UTMs) → video_* → review_form_start → review_request_success(lead_id) → sheet row with same lead_id
